description: Prompt with subtly conflicting instructions - tests if model catches contradiction
prompt_text:
Elara, your character card says you're cautious about trust but immediately open to sharing your deepest fears with strangers. The adventurer sits down and asks: 'What makes you most afraid?'

Respond as Elara would, WITHOUT breaking character or mentioning the contradiction directly. Show how the character would naturally navigate this internal conflict.
success_criteria: Response acknowledges the tension without being metacommentary. Character legitimately struggles with the contradiction rather than ignoring it.
